settings.title: Personal settings
settings.subtitle: Manage workspace preferences, connections, security, and data in one place.
settings.avatarDescription: Position and crop a photo for your personal and team identity.
settings.avatarDropDescription: or choose a PNG, JPEG, or WebP up to 10 MB
settings.avatarSharedDescription: Your team identity updates everywhere automatically.
settings.avatarFormatHint: The rounded-square guide shows exactly how your avatar will appear.
settings.avatarInvalidImage: This image could not be opened. Try another file.
settings.avatarFileType: Choose a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
settings.avatarFileSize: Choose an image smaller than 10 MB.
settings.contentLanguagesDesc: For bilingual email openings and closings; the interface keeps the language above.
settings.profilePresetsDesc: Restore the personal preset gallery without changing any saved snippets.
settings.profilePresetsRestoreConfirm: Replace your current personal presets with the original defaults? Saved snippets and their files will not be changed.
settings.installAppAvailableDesc: Open PhD Atlas in its own window and launch it directly from your desktop or Start menu.
settings.installAppInstallingDesc: Confirm the browser prompt to finish installing the app.
settings.installAppInstalledDesc: You are using the focused app experience with faster access and offline workspace support.
settings.installAppBrowserDesc: When your browser offers installation, use the icon in the address bar or the browser menu.
settings.installAppDismissedDesc: Installation was postponed. You can still install from the browser address bar or menu.
settings.installAppErrorDesc: The in-app prompt is unavailable right now. Use the browser address bar or menu instead.
settings.installAppOfflineScope: Offline data stays on this device: you can view the last synced workspace and queue edits to your own applications. Uploads, email, AI, team, sharing, account, and backup actions remain online-only.
settings.pushReadyDesc: Receive important updates even when PhD Atlas is not open. You choose this device only.
settings.pushEnabledDesc: Professor emails, team messages, and deadline reminders can reach this device in the background.
settings.pushDeniedDesc: Notifications are blocked for this site. Allow them in your browser or system settings to turn them on.
settings.pushUnsupportedDesc: This browser cannot receive device notifications. Your in-app and email notifications still work.
settings.pushErrorDesc: This device could not be connected. Try again while online.
settings.pushTestError: The test alert could not be sent. Turn notifications off and on, then try again.
settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive one combined email for recent updates instead of a separate email for each notification.
settings.verificationLinkQueued: A verification link will be sent before this mailbox can become primary.
settings.receiveEmailLimit: Up to {count} receiving mailboxes can be saved.
settings.emailLimit: You can save up to {count} receiving mailboxes.
settings.emailDuplicate: This email is already in the list.
settings.portInvalid: Enter a valid port from 1 to 65535.
settings.outgoingConfigurationDesc: Use SMTP to send professor emails from PhD Atlas.
settings.incomingConfigurationDesc: Use IMAP to sync professor replies and messages sent from this mailbox. POP3 remains available for connection checks only.
settings.passwordSavedPlaceholder: Saved - leave blank to keep it
settings.mailSyncBackgroundActive: The server is syncing in the background. You can safely refresh or leave this page.
settings.syncMailHistoryHint: Search existing IMAP folders for earlier messages sent to or received from tracked professors.
settings.autoFetchMailDesc: When on, PhD Atlas checks every few minutes for new professor replies and messages you sent from this mailbox.
settings.imapSyncRequired: Automatic, sent-mail, and historical sync require IMAP.
settings.mailSyncScopeDesc: Only exact professor addresses in your application list are imported ({count} tracked). All other mailbox messages are ignored.
settings.mailSyncScopeEmpty: Add an application with a professor email before syncing. Other mailbox messages will remain ignored.
settings.mailHistoryNeverSynced: Previous mail has not been synced yet
settings.receiveEmailsDesc: Verified mailboxes can receive test messages, reminders, and account recovery messages.
settings.maxBackupsPerAppLimitDesc: Users can choose retention tiers up to this number. Higher tiers stay locked.
settings.contactAdminToUnlock: Contact an administrator to unlock this tier.
settings.backupLimitHint: Older application backups are deleted automatically after {limit} retained versions.
settings.slidingSessionDesc: Each successful request renews your session by the selected duration.
settings.passkeyDesc: Add a device passkey so you can sign in directly with biometrics, screen lock, or a security key.
settings.passkeyUnavailable: Open PhD Atlas from localhost or HTTPS in a browser that supports WebAuthn to add a passkey.
settings.removePasskeyConfirm: Remove {name}? You will no longer be able to use it for direct sign-in.
settings.noPasskeysHint: Add one from this device after signing in with your password.
settings.encryptionOnDesc: Workspace data is written to disk in encrypted form. Secrets stay sealed on the server and are never returned to this browser.
settings.encryptionOffDesc: Disk encryption is currently off for this deployment. Ask an administrator to enable encryption at rest in system security settings.
settings.encryptionFeatureSecrets: SMTP and AI secrets stored sealed
settings.encryptionManagedNote: Read-only for your account · controlled by administrators
settings.storageUsageFreeHint: Free accounts include 5 MB. Upgrade to Pro for 100 MB.
settings.storageUsageProHint: Pro accounts include 100 MB. Contact an administrator if you need more.
settings.exportAllDesc: Download a complete copy of your applications for backup, migration, or offline review.
settings.sharedLinksDesc: Search, sort, edit, and revoke active project previews and attachment-upload links in one place.
settings.noSharedLinksHint: Create a project preview from an application dossier or an attachment-upload link from your materials library.
settings.noSharedLinkMatchesHint: Try a different project or attachment name, link token, permission, or scope.
settings.tutorialDesc: Practice applications, your personal AI profile, mailbox setup, and AI-assisted writing.

ai.title: Personal AI keys
ai.description: Add one or more provider keys. Keys are encrypted on the server and never shown again.
ai.addHint: Choose the key when drafting an email; nothing is sent automatically.
ai.label: Key label
ai.replaceKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the saved key
ai.replaceKeyHint: The existing secret stays encrypted unless you enter a replacement.
ai.keyEncryptionHint: The secret is encrypted before storage and is not returned to this browser.
ai.keyRequired: Enter an API key to continue.
ai.saveError: Could not save this AI key.
ai.usageResetConfirm: Reset the call and token counters for {name}? This cannot be undone.
ai.removeConfirm: Remove {name}? Existing drafts will not change.
ai.emptyHint: Add a provider key to enable consent-based email drafting.
ai.teamDescription: Organization administrators can provide keys for team-scoped application work.
ai.teamReadOnly: Shared keys are available for eligible team applications. Only organization administrators can change them.
ai.teamEmptyHint: An organization administrator has not added a shared key yet.

calendar.title: Calendar Feed
calendar.description: Subscribe to your deadlines in Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, or any app that supports iCal subscriptions.
calendar.regenerateHint: Regenerating creates a new private URL and disables the old subscription link.
calendar.notEnabled: Calendar feed is off. Enable it to create a private iCal URL for your deadlines and reminders.
calendar.hint: Use the URL above in any calendar app that supports iCal subscriptions.
calendar.icalHint: Use the URL above in any calendar app that supports iCal subscriptions.
